outline.title: Title
outline.summary: Comic-book cover layout. The tired animals from Day 1 looking at a glowing refrigerator full of healthy food.

outline.title: Warm Up Time!

outline.title: Phonics Power!

outline.title: -air-
outline.summary: 2x2 grid. (1) fair, (2) chair, (3) stairs, (4) pair. Highlight "air".

outline.title: -are-

outline.title: Game Time: Sound Stomp!

outline.title: Hero Fuel!

outline.title: Hero Training!
outline.summary: Split panel. LEFT: "Eat an apple!" (hero eating). RIGHT: "Wash your hands!" (hero washing hands).

outline.title: Story Time!
outline.summary: The five animals are still tired. Coach Lion appears and points to a table full of healthy food.

outline.title: Fuel for the Gorilla!
outline.summary: The gorilla eating a banana. "The gorilla eats a banana. Now he is strong!"

outline.title: Fuel for the Giraffe!
outline.summary: The giraffe drinking water. "The giraffe drinks water. Now she is fast!"

outline.title: Clean Hero!
outline.summary: The monkey washing its hands. "Wash your hands, monkey! Be a clean hero!"

outline.title: Powers Restored!
outline.summary: All animals standing tall and strong, glowing with energy. "We are Healthy Heroes!"

outline.title: Every Day!
outline.summary: A comic calendar. "I eat an apple every day. I wash my hands every day."

outline.title: Game Time: Healthy Habits Match!
outline.summary: Comic panels showing good habits vs bad habits for kids to identify.

outline.title: What do you do?
